concerns.text: T026a (Model-Seed Null Distribution) is marked as a prerequisite for T027 (Permutation Test Loop), but T026a itself depends on T014 (Main Orchestrator) which is not yet implemented. The permutation loop (T027) requires the SVD pipeline (T011-T013) to be fully functional to generate the null distribution, yet T014 is listed as a dependency for T026a, creating a circular or premature dependency chain where the statistical test logic is defined before the core pipeline it tests is complete.

T029 (External Validation) lists T014 (Main Orchestrator) as a dependency. However, T029 requires the 'subspace orientation' (output of T012/T013) and 'WALS features' (T029a). T014 is an orchestrator that runs the pipeline; the subspace data exists after T013. T029 should depend on T013 (SVD extraction) and T029a (WALS config), not the orchestrator T014, to allow parallel execution of validation logic while the main pipeline is still being integrated.

T020 (Mean Embedding) and T021 (Token Ranking) depend on T019 (Frequency Distributions) and T012 (SVD). However, T019 depends on T018 (Data Loader for Common Crawl/RedPajama). T018 is marked as 'Requires: T005' (Validate Citations) but T005 is in Phase 2. The dependency chain T018 -> T019 -> T020 -> T021 is correct, but T021 also explicitly requires T012 (SVD). T012 is in Phase 3 (US1). This creates a cross-phase dependency where US2 tasks (T020/T021) depend on US1 implementation (T012). While US2 can start after Foundational, the specific task T021 cannot run until T012 is complete. The task list implies US2 can proceed independently, but T021 is blocked by US1's T012.

T008a (Profiling) is placed in Phase 2 (Foundational) and marked as a prerequisite for the 6-hour constraint check. However, it depends on T011 (Model Analyzer) and T012 (SVD) to actually perform the profiling run. T011 and T012 are in Phase 3 (US1). This creates a logical impossibility: T008a cannot run before T011/T012 exist, yet it is placed in Phase 2 as a blocking prerequisite for all user stories. T008a should be moved to Phase 3 or re-ordered to depend on T011/T012.

T026a (Model-Seed Null Distribution) requires T014 (Main Orchestrator). T014 is the orchestrator for US1. T026a is part of US3. The statistical test (US3) requires the SVD logic (US1) to be implemented. T026a should depend on T012 (SVD extraction) and T013 (Similarity Calculation) directly, not the orchestrator T014, to ensure the statistical logic can be unit-tested independently of the main pipeline integration.
